Class GradingService

  • Field Details

    • postList

      private final PostList postList

    • replyList

      private final ReplyList replyList

    • currentRole

      private Role currentRole

  • Constructor Details

    • GradingService

      public GradingService(PostList postList, ReplyList replyList, Role currentRole)
      Builds a grading service around the shared post/reply stores.
      Parameters:
      postList - list of discussion posts used to resolve recipients
      replyList - list of replies used to compute participation stats
      currentRole - active caller role used for access checks

  • Method Details

    • setCurrentRole

      public void setCurrentRole(Role currentRole)
      Updates the active role used by protected grading methods.
      Parameters:
      currentRole - new role to apply for authorization

    • addReply

      public Reply addReply(int replyId, int postId, String body, String replierId)
      Adds a reply while preserving who authored the original post. This relationship is required for rule-of-three analytics.
      Parameters:
      replyId - unique reply id
      postId - target post id
      body - reply content
      replierId - author id for the replier
      Returns:
      saved reply

    • countUniqueStudentsAnswered

      public int countUniqueStudentsAnswered(String studentId) throws AccessDeniedException
      Computes how many different students this student has replied to.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being evaluated
      Returns:
      number of unique recipients
      Throws:
      AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • checkGradingEligibility

      public boolean checkGradingEligibility(String studentId) throws AccessDeniedException
      Assignment-facing method name for the rule-of-three check.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if student has replied to at least three unique recipients
      Throws:
      AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • meetsThreeUniqueRequirement

      public boolean meetsThreeUniqueRequirement(String studentId) throws AccessDeniedException
      Backward-compatible alias for rule-of-three eligibility.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being evaluated
      Returns:
      true when eligibility is met
      Throws:
      AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • getAnswersForReview

      public List<Reply> getAnswersForReview(String studentId) throws AccessDeniedException
      Returns all replies authored by a student for quick reasonableness review.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being reviewed
      Returns:
      list of replies by the student
      Throws:
      AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • showAllStats

      public Map<String,Integer> showAllStats() throws AccessDeniedException
      Builds a compact map of student id to unique-recipient count.
      Returns:
      stats map used by grader/teacher view
      Throws:
      AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • requireStaffRole

      private void requireStaffRole() throws AccessDeniedException
      Enforces that only instructional roles can access grading analytics.
      Throws:
      AccessDeniedException - when current role is not INSTRUCTOR, GRADER, or TA

    • isBlank

      private boolean isBlank(String value)
      Checks whether a string is null or whitespace-only.
      Parameters:
      value - value to evaluate
      Returns:
      true when value is null or blank after trimming

    • trimOrEmpty

      private String trimOrEmpty(String value)
      Normalizes null strings to empty strings and trims surrounding spaces.
      Parameters:
      value - input value
      Returns:
      normalized non-null value
